testcase.name: register_shouldPersistUser
testcase.system-out:

for 4.287) Hibernate: select u1_0.id from sys_user u1_0 where u1_0.phone=? limit ? Hibernate: insert into sys_user (created_at, last_login_time, lock_time, login_fail_count, password, phone, remember_password, status, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.last_login_time, u1_0.lock_time, u1_0.login_fail_count, u1_0.password, u1_0.phone, u1_0.remember_password, u1_0.status, u1_0.updated_at from sys_user u1_0 where u1_0.phone=?

testcase.name: register_duplicatePhone_shouldFail
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into sys_user (created_at, last_login_time, lock_time, login_fail_count, password, phone, remember_password, status, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select u1_0.id from sys_user u1_0 where u1_0.phone=? limit ?

testcase.name: updateProfile_shouldPersist
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into sys_user (created_at, last_login_time, lock_time, login_fail_count, password, phone, remember_password, status, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

testcase.name: login_shouldSucceed
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into sys_user (created_at, last_login_time, lock_time, login_fail_count, password, phone, remember_password, status, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.last_login_time, u1_0.lock_time, u1_0.login_fail_count, u1_0.password, u1_0.phone, u1_0.remember_password, u1_0.status, u1_0.updated_at from sys_user u1_0 where u1_0.phone=?

testcase.name: login_wrongPassword_shouldFail
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into sys_user (created_at, last_login_time, lock_time, login_fail_count, password, phone, remember_password, status, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.last_login_time, u1_0.lock_time, u1_0.login_fail_count, u1_0.password, u1_0.phone, u1_0.remember_password, u1_0.status, u1_0.updated_at from sys_user u1_0 where u1_0.phone=?

testcase.name: logout_shouldSucceed
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into sys_user (created_at, last_login_time, lock_time, login_fail_count, password, phone, remember_password, status, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

testcase.name: resetPassword_shouldSucceed
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into sys_user (created_at, last_login_time, lock_time, login_fail_count, password, phone, remember_password, status, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.last_login_time, u1_0.lock_time, u1_0.login_fail_count, u1_0.password, u1_0.phone, u1_0.remember_password, u1_0.status, u1_0.updated_at from sys_user u1_0 where u1_0.phone=? Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.last_login_time, u1_0.lock_time, u1_0.login_fail_count, u1_0.password, u1_0.phone, u1_0.remember_password, u1_0.status, u1_0.updated_at from sys_user u1_0 where u1_0.phone=?

testcase.name: getProfile_shouldReturnUserData
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into sys_user (created_at, last_login_time, lock_time, login_fail_count, password, phone, remember_password, status, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
